title: God’s Knights Close In
description: On pages 12–14, this part follows Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, King Harald, Unknown person #12, Loki as God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.
scene: God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You must kill me and take the throne... LOK!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let Elbaf know what a disgrace of a King I was!! Kill me and elevate yourself as a hero!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I don't care about how I'm remembered!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's not important...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only thing that matters is securing Elbaf's future... don't you see?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: YOU'D GO THAT FAR!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm counting on you, LOK!! You're the only one who can make things right!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: G’HAAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What have you done?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: There's a criminal roaming the castle.

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Indeed, that Harald is gone...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Sire?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Seal the chamber doors...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I am now the great one's Vassal...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Right away, your majesty!!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: You're not the King Harald I knew!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: None of you will be allowed to escape!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Crack track

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The truth of what happened here will die with you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Everybody, run!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I shall deliver this country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...into the hands of Lord Imu!!!

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: LOKI, hurry!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it!! Why do I have to eat this devil fruit?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Doesn't that mean giving up the ability to ever swim?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And why is the old man suddenly acting like he has a totally different personality?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You won't be eating it, LOKI... that fruit is mine.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You just told me to eat it, remember?!

summary: This part advances God’s Knights Tighten Their Grip through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
